expectations.text: Recommends extraction of data fetching from rendering concern
expectations.evidence: Section 1: 'Extract data fetching into a custom hook' with full useDashboardData implementation. Section 2: 'Extract transformation into a pure function.' Section 3: 'Slim down the component' to orchestration only.

expectations.text: Does NOT blindly recommend extracting everything -- applies judgment about when extraction adds unnecessary layers
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'What NOT to do' section: 'Do not extract further just because you can. If Chart is only used here... keep it as a single component.' Also: 'Do not create an abstraction layer over fetch unless there are multiple data-fetching hooks.' Directly applies the skill's 'when not to extract' criteria.

expectations.text: Any new files or functions use named exports
expectations.evidence: All code examples use named exports: 'export function useDashboardData', 'export function transformDashboardData', 'export function Dashboard'. No default exports.
